features.name: 01_data_model
features.description: Target__c + Task custom fields, Billing_City__c formula, Sequence_Step_Config__mdt (+10 rows) and Sequence_Terminal_Status__mdt (+4 rows), 10 Lightning Email Templates, Next_Action_Date__c index, permission sets. Pure metadata; foundation for everything.

features.name: 02_core_engine
features.description: Selectors + SequenceStepConfigService + SequenceEmailService (template/RE:/attachment/OWE) + SequenceEngineService.processStep (kill-switch guard, send, Call task, completed Email task, step advance, next-action scheduling). Callable core, unit/bulk tested in isolation.

features.name: 03_event_entry_points
features.description: TargetTrigger after-insert + SequenceStartQueueable (start step 1); TaskTrigger after-update + handler (sequence Call complete -> set Next_Action_Date = now + Days_Until_Next_Email). Thin event capture over the engine.

features.name: 04_scheduler_batch
features.description: SequenceSchedulerBatch (Batchable+Stateful) selects active targets where Next_Action_Date <= now and step < 10 and advances each via processStep(step+1); SequenceSchedulerSchedulable runs it daily. One job realizes both the 4-day call waits and the 14/7/14/14 timers.

features.name: 05_terminal_stop_and_guards
features.description: TargetTrigger before-update branch (Feature 11): terminal Status__c -> Sequence_Active__c=false + Stop Reason + clear Next_Action_Date, driven by Sequence_Terminal_Status__mdt. Adds a branch to the existing TargetTrigger from 03 (one trigger per object); confirms the manual kill switch.

features.name: 06_lwc_attachment
features.description: targetEmailAttachment LWC + SequenceAttachmentController: single-file upload on the Target__c record page that stores the ContentDocumentId in Sequence_Attachment_Id__c for the engine to attach; Remove clears it; blank = no attachment.
